meaning: [复]n.(尤指内容淫亵非正式出版的)连环漫画
examples: This happens in Firefox and Comix, and recently I found that this happens too when I try to export my project in Audacity.
I try to run Comix from the command line, and try to open file, then it will crash and close, and I got a message 'Segmentation fault'.
